metadata.description: Curated sources for production LLM inference: serving architectures, latency/throughput optimization, quantization, disaggregated inference, and runtime observability.

foundational_papers_and_specs.name: vLLM: Easy and Fast LLM Serving with PagedAttention
foundational_papers_and_specs.relevance: Reference architecture for KV-cache aware serving and high-throughput scheduling.

foundational_papers_and_specs.name: Orca: A Distributed Serving System for Transformer-Based Generative Models
foundational_papers_and_specs.relevance: Scheduling and batching foundations for high-throughput generative model serving.

foundational_papers_and_specs.name: FlashAttention
foundational_papers_and_specs.relevance: Core attention kernel optimization; helps reason about memory/latency tradeoffs.

foundational_papers_and_specs.name: FlashAttention-3
foundational_papers_and_specs.relevance: Hopper-optimized attention achieving 85% GPU utilization with FP8 support.

foundational_papers_and_specs.name: FlashInfer: Efficient Attention Engine (MLSys 2025 Best Paper)
foundational_papers_and_specs.relevance: NVIDIA's kernel library for LLM inference with unified attention/GEMM/MoE APIs.

foundational_papers_and_specs.name: Fast Inference from Transformers via Speculative Decoding
foundational_papers_and_specs.relevance: Speculative decoding technique for latency reduction with draft/target models.

foundational_papers_and_specs.name: DistServe: Disaggregating Prefill and Decoding (OSDI 2024)
foundational_papers_and_specs.relevance: Foundational paper for prefill/decode disaggregation architecture.

foundational_papers_and_specs.name: OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for GenAI
foundational_papers_and_specs.relevance: Standard telemetry fields for tokens, latency, models, and tool calls in LLM serving.

inference_engines_and_runtimes.name: vLLM Documentation
inference_engines_and_runtimes.relevance: Implementation reference for KV-cache aware serving, batching, and deployment configuration.

inference_engines_and_runtimes.name: vLLM Disaggregated Prefilling
inference_engines_and_runtimes.relevance: Official guide for prefill/decode separation in vLLM 0.6+.

inference_engines_and_runtimes.name: TensorRT-LLM Documentation
inference_engines_and_runtimes.relevance: Vendor implementation reference for optimized GPU inference and kernel-level tuning.

inference_engines_and_runtimes.name: Text Generation Inference (TGI) Documentation
inference_engines_and_runtimes.relevance: Production inference server patterns: batching, streaming, and deployment topologies.

inference_engines_and_runtimes.name: llama.cpp
inference_engines_and_runtimes.relevance: Reference for CPU/edge inference and quantized model formats used in constrained environments.

inference_engines_and_runtimes.name: SGLang
inference_engines_and_runtimes.relevance: Serving framework with RadixAttention for KV cache reuse; 6.4x throughput on structured workloads.

inference_engines_and_runtimes.name: SGLang Llama3 Performance Blog
inference_engines_and_runtimes.relevance: Benchmarks showing SGLang performance advantages over vLLM and TensorRT-LLM.

inference_engines_and_runtimes.name: FlashInfer GitHub
inference_engines_and_runtimes.relevance: NVIDIA's kernel library integrated into vLLM and SGLang for optimized attention.

inference_engines_and_runtimes.name: Triton Inference Server
inference_engines_and_runtimes.relevance: Serving runtime reference for GPU inference, model ensembles, and production deployment patterns.

disaggregated_inference.name: Hao AI Lab: Disaggregated Inference 18 Months Later
disaggregated_inference.relevance: Retrospective on P/D disaggregation adoption across vLLM, SGLang, NVIDIA Dynamo.

disaggregated_inference.name: Ray Serve Prefill/Decode Disaggregation
disaggregated_inference.relevance: Ray Serve implementation of disaggregated inference.

disaggregated_inference.name: Perplexity: Disaggregated Prefill and Decode
disaggregated_inference.relevance: Production implementation patterns from Perplexity's KV messenger architecture.

quantization_and_compression.name: GPTQ: Accurate Post-Training Quantization for Generative Pre-trained Transformers
quantization_and_compression.relevance: Weight-only post-training quantization technique; useful for memory and cost reduction decisions.

quantization_and_compression.name: AWQ: Activation-aware Weight Quantization for LLMs
quantization_and_compression.relevance: Quantization approach that targets accuracy retention under aggressive compression.

quantization_and_compression.name: SmoothQuant
quantization_and_compression.relevance: Activation smoothing technique enabling accurate INT8 quantization for transformer inference.

quantization_and_compression.name: bitsandbytes
quantization_and_compression.relevance: Widely used low-precision kernels and quantization utilities; helpful for experimentation and integration.

quantization_and_compression.name: Compressed Tensors (llm-compressor)
quantization_and_compression.relevance: Model compression tooling and formats used for serving-time optimization workflows.

serving_operations_and_security.name: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
serving_operations_and_security.relevance: Threat categories for LLM-integrated serving (prompt injection, data leakage, abuse).

serving_operations_and_security.name: Prometheus Documentation
serving_operations_and_security.relevance: Baseline monitoring stack for latency, errors, saturation metrics, and alerting.
